allow: Bash(node -e "const l = require\('lucide-react'\); const socials = Object.keys\(l\).filter\(k => /facebook|twitter|instagram|linkedin|x$/i.test\(k\)\); console.log\(socials.join\('\\n'\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const l = require\('lucide-react'\); const socials = Object.keys\(l\).filter\(k => /^\(Lucide\)?\(Facebook|Twitter|Youtube|Github|Rss|Globe|Share|Link|AtSign\)/i.test\(k\) && !k.startsWith\('Lucide'\)\); console.log\(socials.slice\(0,20\).join\('\\n'\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const l = require\('lucide-react'\); ['Share2', 'Globe', 'AtSign', 'Rss', 'Youtube', 'Send', 'MessageCircle'].forEach\(n => console.log\(n, n in l\)\)")
